Name: Blessed Brew
Description: The Garou can infuse a beverage with spiritual power, enabling it to embolden and strengthen the mental fortitude of those who drink it. A hearth- or herb-spirit grants this Gift
System: Anyone who drinks the equivalent of a glass of a liquid affected by this Gift receives the following benefit: For the next test to resist any kind fear or hostile supernatural mental ability, add a number of dice equal to the Glory of the Gift user. The Gift user can infuse the equivalent of a single bottle of liquid, enough for an entire pack, and the brew and its effect remain active until used or the session ends. This Gift can be used only once per session and can be used in any form.
